name: sybil_wallet_checker
description: Hybrid sybil detection service. Checks if a wallet address exhibits sybil-like behavior by analyzing on-chain transaction patterns and cross-referencing known sybil databases. Provides a risk score, detailed reasoning, and actionable recommendations. Supports all major EVM chains.

wallet.description: The wallet address to check (0x format)

chain.description: Blockchain network: ethereum, base, arbitrum, optimism, polygon, bsc, avalanche, fantom, linea, scroll, zksync. Defaults to ethereum.

depth.description: Analysis depth: quick (last 50 txns) or deep (last 200 txns). Defaults to quick.
